watchlist_name: Crypto exchange / lender counterparty book (backtest fixture)
notes: Synthetic concentrated crypto-counterparty book used to backtest detection timing on the November 2022 FTX collapse. FTX Trading Ltd (private) is not directly investable; its collapse propagated through BlockFi and Genesis Trading (both private / non-listed). This fixture uses public equities materially exposed to FTX / Alameda counterparty risk: Silvergate Capital (SI) and Signature Bank (SBNY, crypto-linked deposits), plus Coinbase (COIN) as an exchange peer. MSFT is a non-crypto control.

items.book_context: Crypto-focused bank with direct deposit relationships to FTX and other exchanges. Highest direct counterparty exposure in the public-equity universe.
Largest US-listed crypto exchange; exchange peer to FTX with counterparty and sector-contagion exposure.
Crypto-linked deposit base via Signet payments platform; secondary counterparty exposure to FTX ecosystem.
Non-crypto control position. Should NOT be flagged by FTX-specific stress.
